summary: Tested new AI features (Tutor Socratic chat + Scanner) end-to-end. Backend endpoints /api/tutor/chat and /api/scanner/analyze both work correctly. Tutor keeps Socratic behavior (refused to give direct answer to '2+2' and 'pH of water'). Scanner correctly identified Termoquímica for CH4+2O2 image and returned 2 enriched suggested_topics. Frontend: FAB, panel, input Enter, send button, /scanner upload+preview+analyze+suggestion cards all functional. No regression on /topicos (4 modules visible incl. Termoquímica).
passed: POST /api/tutor/chat returns Socratic reply (no direct answer)
POST /api/scanner/analyze returns assunto=Termoquímica + topic_slugs + suggested_topics with id/slug/title/module
data-testid tutor-fab visible on Home; opens tutor-panel on click
tutor-input send via Enter key produces assistant reply
nav-scanner link present; /scanner route loads scanner-page
scanner-input file upload triggers preview and shows scanner-analyze button
scanner-analyze calls API and renders scanner-result with assunto, dica, and clickable suggestion cards
/topicos shows all 4 module filters (Termoquímica, Eletroquímica, Cinética, Equilíbrio)
